CASE 157807, WILLIAMS VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO WAS RECEIVED FROM SUPERIOR COURT ON 6-25-98 AND FILED ON THE SAME DAY IN MUNICIPAL COURT.
THE TRANSFER FEE IN THIS CASE WAS WAIVED PER ORDER OF THE HONORABLE ERNEST GOLDSMITH. THE SUPERIOR COURT CASE NUMBER, IN THIS MATTER, IS 979799.
